# Project Status

This file was reset on extraction into the **Line-Bundle Comparison Iso**
subproject. The parent's accumulated iteration narrative (iter-099‚Ä¶iter-303,
much of it about files now out of scope) was dropped; this subproject's own
`archon` run regenerates status as it makes progress. Per-iter narrative lives
in `iter/iter-NNN/review.md`; this file carries the cumulative Knowledge Base only.

Current scope and live state live in [`PROGRESS.md`](PROGRESS.md) and
[`STRATEGY.md`](STRATEGY.md). Summary:

- **Seeds:** `lem:pullback_tensor_iso_loctriv`, `lem:dual_isLocallyTrivial`,
  `thm:rel_pic_addcommgroup_via_tensorobj` (108-node cone).
- **Open targets (post iter-017):** TensorObjSubstrate.lean GREEN, 2 sorries ‚Äî
  `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L719, import-cycle, deferred) and `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`
  (decl L3144; residual `hcore2` at L3626). Steps (i) [iter-015], (ii) [iter-016 `sheafifyMap_Œ¥comp_split`],
  and (iii)-a/b.1/b.2 [iter-017, the S1^h slide + prefix-cancel + slide-of-V] all CLOSED+spliced. **Residual
  = `hcore2` only:** the folded Sq3/Sq4 **presheaf** identity (D1‚Ä≤-level chase). Sq3/Sq4 are NOT built
  standalone (`sheafifyTensorUnitIso_comp`/`pullbackValIso_comp` are orphaned blueprint targets, merged
  into `hcore2`). `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_tail`/`_comp`/`_comp_natTrans`/`hŒ¥` CLOSED iter-006.
  **DualInverse/SliceTransport.lean GREEN, 0 sorries ‚Äî DUAL route CLOSED** (`sliceDualTransport` incl.
  left_inv/right_inv proved, axiom-clean). Full chain builds green together.
- **Stage:** prover.

## Knowledge Base

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)
- **Dual flank S3 is NOT a depth-mirror of S2 ‚Äî the iter-066 crux is `_natural`, not `_restrict` (iter-067, CONFIRMED reversal).** Dual Bridge B1 `dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison` (`TensorObjInverse.lean:~1085`) is **`rfl`**: the sibling-file Œ∏ `presheafDualPullbackComparison f M` is definitionally the Step-4 factor of `dual_restrict_iso` (`DualInverse.lean:166`), so `dual_restrict_iso f M = RFIP.app(dual M) ‚â™‚â´ SCP.app(dual M.val) ‚â™‚â´ sheafify.mapIso Œ∏` closes by `rfl`. With it, S3 mirrors S2's opening: `rw [dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison √ó3, restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat j hjŒπ M.dual]; simp only [Iso.trans_assoc]; congr 1` discharges the dual-B1 promotion + **Bridge B2 (RFIP)** leg + `œÅ_{M.dual}` cancellation. BUT the residual needs TWO bridges the iter-066 single-immersion crux does NOT supply: **(b)** an SCP composition law over `j ‚â´ U.Œπ = V.Œπ` (`sheafificationCompPullback` is a bare nat-iso; no composite-immersion law exists), and **(c)** a Œ∏-cocycle over `pullbackComp` relating `Œ∏_{V.Œπ,M}`,`(pullback j)Œ∏_{U.Œπ,M}`,`Œ∏_{j,M|U}`. The crux is Œ∏'s `_natural` (per-open, single immersion), NOT the `_restrict` *composition* ‚Äî they are different lemmas. ‚öÝ Dead end: `simp/rw [Functor.mapIso_trans]` does NOT distribute the RHS `(restrictFunctor j).mapIso` here (unlike S2; reports "unused"); use `conv_rhs` in-file. Effort-break S3 into dual-L1 (bridge b) + dual-L2 (bridge c) + dual-L3 assembly, seeded from S2's `pullback_tensor_map_basechange`/`pullback_tensor_map_natural` dual analogues. S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` rides on (b) + a Œ∏-unit identification (= proven `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality` promoted to `j`).
- **DUAL bridges (b)/(c) are BOTH blocked OUTSIDE `TensorObjInverse.lean`'s write domain ‚Äî recurs the ROOT-PRIVACY pattern (iter-068, 0-close diagnosis iter).** The iter-068 plan ("(b) = one-line specialise of proven Sq1; (c) = consume the closed crux") failed at the file boundary: **(b)** `sheafificationCompPullback_restrict` (named target added, `sorry`) needs `exact sheafificationCompPullback_comp j U.Œπ P`, but Sq1 `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` + tail helpers `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_tail`, `sheaf_unit_comp_pushforward_pullbackComp_inv` are **`private`** in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` ‚Üí *Unknown identifier* across the import (only PUBLIC SCP handle is `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq`, definitional not a comp law). Fix = un-`private` Sq1 (+2 helpers) OR relocate (b) into `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` (its natural home). **(c)** `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` can't even be STATED: the cocycle's three Œ∏'s object-mismatch ‚Äî codomain `(pullback œÜ_j).obj (dual ((pushforward Œ≤_{Œπ_U}).obj M.val))` ‚âÝ domain `(pullback œÜ_j).obj (dual (M.restrict U.Œπ).val)` ‚Äî needs the missing iso `(pushforward Œ≤_{Œπ_U}).obj M.val ‚âÖ (M.restrict U.Œπ).val` (= the `RFIP;SCP;H1` composite). Fix = build Œ∏-composition + object-id infra in SIBLING `DualInverse/PresheafDualPullback.lean`, then state (c). **General lesson (re-confirmed): a one-line `exact` of a known PROVEN lemma yielding *Unknown identifier* is a `private`/visibility blocker, NOT a proof gap ‚Äî check visibility before re-deriving; the fix is planner/refactor, not a prover round.** S3 partial reaches the EXACT `case e_Œ≤` residual (B1+B2 legs discharged, `œÅ_{M.dual}` cancelled) ‚Üí one clean assembly from done once (b)+(c) land.
- **Cone B c.1/c.2 STATED + reduced (iter-069): c.1 closed `Iso.refl`, c.2 reduced to its exact (a)+(b) residual ‚Äî reversal twice-confirmed.** **c.1** `pushforwardObjValRestrictIso : (pushforward Œ≤).obj M.val ‚âÖ (M.restrict f).val` is **`Iso.refl`** (axiom-clean): Mathlib's `Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctor f := SheafOfModules.pushforward (F:=f.opensFunctor) ‚ü®whiskerRight Œ± (forget‚ÇÇ ‚Ä¶)‚ü©` makes `(M.restrict f).val` *definitionally* `(pushforward Œ≤).obj M.val` with exactly the `Œ≤` of `presheafDualPullbackComparison`. **Lesson: inspect the Mathlib `def` before formalizing an abstract composite** ‚Äî the blueprint's H1‚àò(RFIP;SCP) was unnecessary scaffolding. **c.2** `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` (the dual cocycle of proven tensor `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`) is now STATED (typechecks) + sectionwise-reduced (`Iso.ext; PresheafOfModules.hom_ext; intro W; ModuleCat.hom_ext; ext œÜ; simp only [presheafDualPullbackComparison, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom, PresheafOfModules.comp_app]` ‚Äî a *real* reduction exposing both sides as `H1_g.inv ‚â´ (isoMk (sliceDualTransport g ¬∑)).hom`). Residual = genuine **two-immersion pseudofunctoriality** = **(a)** H1 `leftAdjointUniq` cocycle (dual of `conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv`/`conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv`; try `Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso`) + **(b)** `sliceDualTransport` composition law over `image_preimage_of_le` ‚Äî neither supplied by the single-immersion crux. ‚öÝ **Leg-4 routing:** blueprint-literal `dualIsoOfIso((pushforwardComp Œ≤_h Œ≤_f).symm.app M.val)` **whnf-bombs** at any heartbeat budget (`pushforwardComp` at concrete `Scheme.presheaf` Œ≤ forces `Iso.refl` defeq through heavy `opensFunctor`/`appIso`) ‚Äî DEAD END; route through the light eqToHom `Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorComp h f` pushed to presheaves via `forget.mapIso` then `dualIsoOfIso`. **Blueprint still displays leg-4 as `dual((pullbackComp).hom)` (lvb major, becomes must-fix on sorry-close) ‚Äî reconcile to the `restrictFunctorComp` route + add `\uses` edges before (a)+(b) land.**
- **Cone B c.2(a) `presheafDualH1Cocycle` CLOSED sorry-free via GENERIC mate-calculus lift (iter-070); but c.2 itself is the INTERLEAVED MERGE, not (a)+(b)-as-atoms.** (a) the H1 `leftAdjointUniq` cocycle landed by lifting to a NEW generic 3-category lemma `CategoryTheory.Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq_leftAdjointCompIso_comm` (`FC.hom ‚â´ H1‚ÇÄ‚ÇÇ.hom = (H1‚ÇÄ‚ÇÅ.hom ‚ñ∑ F‚ÇÅ‚ÇÇ) ‚â´ (P‚ÇÄ‚ÇÅ ‚óÅ H1‚ÇÅ‚ÇÇ.hom) ‚â´ PC.hom`), proven once + instantiated by one `exact`; dual analogue of keystone `conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv`. Proof idiom: `(conjugateEquiv adjP02 (adjF01.comp adjF12)).injective`, both mates ‚Üí `e.inv` via **`‚Üê conjugateEquiv_comp` (SPLITS the conjugate-of-composite ‚Äî simp form only combines)** + `conjugateEquiv_whiskerLeft/Right` + 2 new mate helpers (`conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom` = `ùüô`, `conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_hom` = `e.inv`). ‚öÝ **Pitfalls:** use `Functor.whiskerRight/Left` NOT bare (else `open MonoidalCategory` shadows ‚Üí `MonoidalCategoryStruct (C‚ÇÄ‚•§C‚ÇÅ)` synth failure); composite-immersion `Œ±hf` needs EXPLICIT `naturality := (h‚â´f).appIso_inv_naturality i` (aesop default fails for `h‚â´f`, works for single). **The 3 generic `Adjunction.*` lemmas have NO blueprint block (coverage debt).** **c.2 `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` STILL OPEN, reversal fired 4th iter (067‚Üí070), now DEFINITIVELY pinned: c.2 ‚âÝ "(a) then standalone (b)".** The c.2 goal INTERLEAVES the H1 factors with the `sliceDualTransport` factors; leg-2 applies the OUTER `(pullback œÜR_h)` to the whole `Œ∏_f` so its H1-part is `(pullback œÜR_h).map H1_f.inv`, but the natural (a)-inverse groups it as `(pushforward Œ≤_h).map H1_f.inv` ‚Äî DIFFERENT middle functor. Closing requires SLIDING the sDT factors past the H1's via the single-immersion crux `presheafDual_pullback_restrict_natural` = the dual mirror of the ~600-line tensor `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (`hslide`/`comp_cancel_mid`). **DO NOT keep (b) standalone-abstract; re-spec (b) = the SPECIFIC in-spelling slide identity the merge needs.** This is a GRIND, not a clean atom ‚Äî consider transcribing the tensor proof dual-for-dual. (Blueprint (a)-inverse display L7883‚Äì7888 is a FAULTY inversion ‚Äî f/h transposed, `pullbackComp.hom`‚Üí`.inv`; `% NOTE` added.)
- **Cone B c.2 DOES factor cleanly ‚Äî iter-070's "interleaved merge, doesn't factor" is DISPROVED (iter-071).** c.2 `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` reduces by pure category/naturality algebra to a SINGLE isolated pushforward-flank identity (**) `FC.hom ; sDT_{h;f} = pushŒ≤_h.map(sDT_f) ; sDT_h(M|f) ; dualIsoOfIso(rfc)`: multiply on the left by `(H1_{h‚â´f}).hom` (`Iso.inv_comp_eq`) + `FC.hom` (`cancel_epi`); cocycle (a) `presheafDualH1Cocycle` rewrites `FC.hom ; H1_{h‚â´f}.hom` into the H1-whisker chain; `pbComp.hom;pbComp.inv=ùüô` cancels; ONE ordinary `H1_h.hom` naturality at `Œ∏_f.hom` slides past; two `H1` `hom_inv_id`s collapse to (**). Only (**) touches `sliceDualTransport` internals. **Build-verified scaffold:** the three pushforward adjunctions reconstructed `let`-transparently (so `hcoc`'s H1/FC are defeq to the goal's) + `have hcoc := presheafDualH1Cocycle h f hadjf hadjh hadjhf` COMPILE & instantiate cleanly (PresheafDualPullback.lean:709-732). The composite `Œ±hf` needs an EXPLICIT `naturality := (h‚â´f).appIso_inv_naturality` field (aesop auto-synth FAILS for the composite; single-immersion f/h fine). **Two blockers to close:** (1) mechanical ‚Äî the abstract reduction tail whnf-BOMBS at maxHeartbeats 3.2M across the PresheafOfModules-over-Z defeq-but-not-syntactic `‚â´` seam: `rw [Iso.inv_comp_eq]`/`cancel_epi`/`set`/`show` ALL bomb on `lake build` (LSP `lean_multi_attempt` typechecks them ‚Äî **LSP-green ‚âÝ build-green, re-confirmed**). Cure = LOCAL copies of the generic single-`[Category C]` bricks `comp_cancel_mid`/`comp_slide_nested`/`comp_cancel_three_lr` applied by `exact`/`refine` (assignment-only unification, no whnf). **CORRECTION: those bricks are `private` in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:2981+`, NOT public ‚Äî copy verbatim, cannot `exact` across the import.** (2) cross-file ‚Äî (**) needs a FORWARD `sliceDualTransport_app_apply` in `DualInverse/SliceTransport.lean` (only the INVERSE `sliceDualTransportInv_app_apply`, L563, exists). ‚öÝ Blueprint c.2 proof + (b) `slice_dual_transport_comp` prose still describe the stale iter-070 framing (`% NOTE` added iter-071; rewrite only AFTER build-verified). Note `\lean{‚Ä¶sliceDualTransport_comp}` is a DANGLING target (decl doesn't exist).
- **Cone B crux = bundled-Hom built-in naturality (iter-066, closed `presheafDual_pullback_restrict_natural` + `..._apply`, axiom-clean).** When a comparison iso `Œ∏` is packaged as a genuine bundled `PresheafOfModules.Hom` (here `Œ∏.hom = presheafDualPullbackComparison f M .hom`), its immersion-naturality is FREE: `funext œÜ; PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply Œ∏.hom (homOfLE j).op œÜ` (sectionwise via `congrArg (evalLin _ (op V) ¬∑ s) (‚Ä¶)`). This BYPASSES the whole blueprint L1;L2;L3a ‚Üí L3b decomposition (which assumed naturality must be *built*). The crux is what S3/S4a consume ‚Üí `import ‚Ä¶PresheafDualPullback` + apply it unblocks the dual flank. Two supporting idioms: (a) **`ModuleCat.ofHom` dual-carrier instance trick** ‚Äî `ofHom` of the raw `LinearMap` needs `Module ((R‚ÇÄ‚ãôforget‚ÇÇ).obj U) ((internalHomPresheaf M' ùüô_).obj U)`, which typeclass search can't find from `internalHomObjModule` alone (carrier whnf-reduces to `internalHomPresheaf`-form one side, `dual`-form other); FIX: supply BOTH carrier-forms via 4 `letI`, build the `LinearMap` over `R‚ÇÄ.obj (op U.unop)` with explicit ascription, land `ModuleCat.ofHom (R := R‚ÇÄ.obj (op U.unop))` by defeq (mirrors `dualIsoOfIso.toModuleIso`); naturality field closes by `cat_disch`. (b) **whnf-bomb avoidance by GENERALIZATION is insufficient when the bomb is in the rewrite, not the object** ‚Äî `naturality_apply (internalHomEval N) (s ‚äó‚Çú œÜ) + erw [tensorObj_map_tmul, internalHomEvalApp_tmul]` whnf-bombs `TensorProduct.lift` at 200k/800k/1.6M both inline (isDefEq on the heavy `pullback` object) AND after generalizing `N` (whnf on the `tmul` rewrite); real fix = the œÜ-naturality (subst/rfl) route inside `internalHomEval`'s own naturality field, needing the `private` `restr_map_homMk`/`hom_app_heq` re-exposed.
- **Cone A is CLOSED (iter-065): keystone ‚Üí L2 ‚Üí L3 ‚Üí bridge-3 (`pullbackTensorMap_left_unitality`) all proved, S4b closed, sorry 5‚Üí3.** Two iter-065 lessons from the bridge-3 close (a pre-written body that was LSP-clean but RED): (a) **missing-`maxHeartbeats` = STALE-GREEN at the LEMMA level** ‚Äî a sheafification-laden proof can elaborate clean under LSP yet `lake build`-fail with `(deterministic) timeout at whnf, 200000 heartbeats` purely from no `set_option maxHeartbeats` override; every such lemma in `TensorObjInverse.lean` needs ‚â•1.6M (bridge-3 uses 4M). Trust ONLY `lake build`. (b) **`SheafOfModules ‚â´` seam 4-leg assembly closer:** reassociate TERM-MODE (`refine (Category.assoc _ _ _).trans ?_` + `congr 1` to peel the shared `scp ‚â´ a_YŒ¥` prefix), then close with a `reassoc_of%`/`congrArg`/`.trans` chain whose appended leg `k` (= the literal `tensorObj_left_unitor.hom`) and the `a_Y(Œ∑‚ñ∑FM)` prefix are **written out EXPLICITLY** ‚Äî bare `_` placeholders mutually under-determine and mis-unify across the defeq-not-syntactic seam (`Application type mismatch`), and `rw [reassoc_of% h, hL2]` MISSES the pattern entirely. The L3 central leg is the **q=ùüô specialization of the already-proven 2-arg `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_natural`** (root `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:1896`) ‚Äî REUSE, do NOT build a `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_naturality_left` core.
- **Seam split-fold idiom (iter-063, reduced L2/L3 in `TensorObjInverse.lean`).** Across the
  `SheafOfModules ‚â´` defeq-not-syntactic seam, a category-lemma rewrite (`rw`/`erw [h]`) and
  `simp only [Category.assoc]` both MISS. Working idiom: isolate the split+rewrite (e.g.
  `tensorObjIsoOfIso_eq_comp` + `Iso.trans_hom` + `Category.assoc`) in an STU-free `have`, then fold it
  into the main goal **term-mode** via `exact congrArg (_ ‚â´ ¬∑) h` / `Eq.trans` ‚Äî `congrArg` lands by
  defeq where the tactic-mode rewrite head-key-misses. (This is how L2's `hcomb` closed.) The shared
  structural residual it could NOT manufacture ‚Äî the `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` STU-collapse coherence ‚Äî
  was authored as a standalone atom in iter-064 (`tensorObj_left_unitor_image_collapse`, see next
  bullet), which then closed L2 (`tensorObj_left_unitor_pullback_eq_sheafify`, sorry 6‚Üí5).
- **STU-collapse keystone toolkit (iter-064, PROVEN `tensorObj_left_unitor_image_collapse`; unblocked L2;
  directly portable to the L3 sibling core `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_naturality_left`).** To prove the sheaf
  left unitor at an image object collapses, `Œº_{ùüô,P} ‚â´ (Œµ ‚ñ∑ aP) ‚â´ Œª_{aP} = a.map Œª_P`
  (`Œº=sheafifyTensorUnitIso`, `Œµ=sheafifyUnitIso`): reduce to the pure presheaf identity
  `hpre : (Œ∑_ùüô ‚äó Œ∑_P);(Œµ ‚äó ùüô);Œª_{aP} = Œª_P ; Œ∑_P`, merge the three `a.map` legs, cancel the trailing
  counit by the adjunction **left-triangle**. **NO localization-monoidal API needed** (the by-hand
  reduction works). Seam-robust idioms (all forced by `restrictScalars ùüô`/`ùü≠.obj` defeq-not-syntactic
  seams): (a) `htri` (`Œ∑.app ùüô_ ‚â´ sheafifyUnitIso.hom.val = ùüô`) via `rw [sheafifyUnitIso]; simpa only
  [Iso.app_hom, asIso_hom] using right_triangle_components _`; (b) presheaf collapse: `rw
  [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom, ‚Üê leftUnitor_naturality]; congr 1; exact congrArg‚ÇÇ (fun a b => tensorHom
  (C:=ùí´) a b) htri (Category.comp_id _)` ‚Äî `rw[htri]`/`simp[htri]` BOTH MISS (`ùüô_` vs `unit.val` defeq),
  `congrArg‚ÇÇ` term-mode absorbs; (c) leg merge: `erw [‚Üê Functor.map_comp_assoc, ‚Üê Functor.map_comp_assoc]`
  (goal LEFT-assoc; `rw[‚Üê Category.assoc]`/`rw[‚Üê Functor.map_comp]` MISS); (d) apply `hpre` into `a.map`:
  `refine Eq.trans (congrArg (fun m => a.map m ‚â´ counit) hpre) ?_; beta_reduce`; (e) left-triangle (counit
  codomain `ùü≠.obj` wrapper ‚Üí `rw` MISSES / `erw` whnf-BOMBS): `erw [Functor.map_comp_assoc]; have htr :=
  (‚Ä¶).left_triangle_components P; exact (congrArg (fun z => a.map (Œª_ P).hom ‚â´ z) htr).trans
  (Category.comp_id _)` ‚Äî **left factor must be EXPLICIT** (a `_` hole becomes z-dependent and fails).
  ‚öÝ Blueprint `\uses` for this node still names the localization-monoidal route (wrong; flagged `% NOTE`
  iter-064) ‚Äî actual deps are the adjunction triangles + `tensorObj_functoriality` +
  `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'`.
- **Whnf-seam idiom on sheafification-carrier goals (iter-054, closed S2 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_restrict_compat`).**
  A `pullbackTensorMap`-laden goal can type-check under LSP yet **whnf-bomb the kernel/full-elaboration at ANY
  heartbeat budget** (S2 timed out at `whnf` even at 6.4M) when seam idioms force a defeq unfold of
  `pullbackTensorMap`‚Üísheafification. Two specific killers + fixes: (1) `erw [Iso.hom_inv_id_app_assoc]` on a
  post-`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` term ‚Üí **isolate the `pullbackComp.hom ‚â´ .inv` cancellation into a tiny
  helper** (e.g. `pullbackTensorMap_restrict_cancel`) discharged by a generic single-`[Category C]`
  `natIso_hom_inv_id_app_assoc` via `exact`, so the big goal never builds the hom-inv adjacency. (2)
  `refine Eq.trans (tensorObj_functoriality_comp _ _ _ _) ?_` with **placeholder object args** ‚Üí unifying
  `TF _ _ ‚â´ TF _ _` whnf-bombs; **supply morphism args EXPLICITLY** (objects come cheaply from morphism types).
  General rule: prefer `exact`/`refine` of a FULLY-APPLIED generic lemma over `erw`/placeholder-`refine`.
  S2 route = B1-promote ‚Üí B2 expand at `M‚äóN` only (keep legs folded) ‚Üí cancel prefixes ‚Üí `Iso.ext` + `RFIP j`
  naturality ‚Üí pre-cancelled comp law ‚Üí `pullbackTensorMap_natural` (D1‚Ä≤) ‚Üí merge `tensorObj_functoriality_comp3`.
- **Substrate left-unitor naturality + the `Œª_`-carrier trap (iter-055, closed S4b BODY
  `tensorObj_unit_iso_restrict_compat` + the two helpers `tensorObj_unit_iso_eq_left_unitor`,
  `tensorObj_left_unitor_naturality`).** (a) `tensorObj_unit_iso = tensorObj_left_unitor ùí™` is pure `unfold; rfl`
  (both are `sheafification.mapIso(presheaf Œª at ùüô_) ‚â™‚â´ counit`; `Œª_ ùüô_` defeq `monoidalCategoryStruct.leftUnitor ùí™.val`).
  (b) For substrate left-unitor naturality, state the inner presheaf seam `hpre` STANDALONE in the syntactic carrier
  `PresheafOfModules (W.presheaf ‚ãô forget‚ÇÇ CommRingCat RingCat)` and close it by `exact MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor_naturality _`.
  ‚öÝ `Œª_` REJECTS `(C := ‚Ä¶)` ‚Äî force the carrier either via the explicit `(monoidalCategoryStruct (R := W.presheaf)).leftUnitor`
  (matches the actual `tensorObj_left_unitor` term) OR via `leftUnitor_naturality _` with a BARE `_` so the expected type
  fixes the category; a FULLY-APPLIED `leftUnitor_naturality _ (forget g.hom)` re-infers the WRONG carrier
  (`W.ringCatSheaf.obj`) ‚Üí instance-synth failure. `id_tensorHom` rewrite of `ùüô‚äó‚Çòf` does NOT fire by name and is NOT
  needed (defeq `ùüô _ ‚äó‚Çò f ‚â° ùüô_ ‚óÅ f`, `forget.obj ùí™ ‚â° ùüô_`). Inline `rw/erw [leftUnitor_naturality]` FAILS (head-keys
  on `ùüô_`, goal has `(unit).val`; rewriting `(unit).val ‚Üí ùüô_` hits a dependent-motive error) ‚Üí use the standalone `hpre`
  + `erw [‚Üê Functor.map_comp, hpre, Functor.map_comp]`, then sheafification-counit naturality (`dualUnitIso_dualIsoOfIso`
  idiom). (c) Apply the naturality lemma at iso-hom level **term-mode** (`congrArg (¬∑ ‚â´ uR.hom) hL2` / `Eq.trans`) ‚Äî a
